case_title: ARCADIA PARTNER LLC VS. STEPHANIE GRANILLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ARCADIA PARTNER LLC
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST RYAN E. VOS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-10-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-01-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCADIA PARTNER LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GRANILLO, STEPHANIE AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-16-2019
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-29-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-10-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-10-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-10-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200013402)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Continued To Oct-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Oct-29-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
